'''鈭歫-ch-f-s''' ('''kajachfesoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:anticorrelate|anticorrelate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-ch-f-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:anticorrelate|anticorrelate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歫-ch-f-s
|-
! Lemma
| kajachfesoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thijachfesoko|thijachfesoko]] || [[word:jijachfesoko|jijachfesoko]] || [[word:shijachfesoko|shijachfesoko]] || [[word:kijachfesoko|kijachfesoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thojachfesoko|thojachfesoko]] || [[word:jojachfesoko|jojachfesoko]] || [[word:shojachfesoko|shojachfesoko]] || [[word:kojachfesoko|kojachfesoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙jachfesoko|th忙jachfesoko]] || [[word:j忙jachfesoko|j忙jachfesoko]] || [[word:sh忙jachfesoko|sh忙jachfesoko]] || [[word:k忙jachfesoko|k忙jachfesoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathajachfesoko|thathajachfesoko]] || [[word:jajajachfesoko|jajajachfesoko]] || [[word:shashajachfesoko|shashajachfesoko]] || [[word:kakajachfesoko|kakajachfesoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thajachfesoko|thajachfesoko]] || [[word:jajachfesoko|jajachfesoko]] || [[word:shajachfesoko|shajachfesoko]] || [[word:kajachfesoko|kajachfesoko]]
|-

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
